items.headline: **Bago: NSA Project Aether (Bloomberg Apr 30) — NSA ay nagbe-benchmark ng Anthro
items.diff_narrative: **Bago: NSA Project Aether (Bloomberg Apr 30) — NSA ay nagbe-benchmark ng Anthropic Mythos Preview laban sa sovereign classified cyber tools na tina-target ang Microsoft software vulnerabilities; Pentagon CTO May 1 statement ay naghihiwalay sa Anthropic-as-supply-chain-risk blacklist mula sa Mythos engagement; Mythos Preview = Apr 7 release sa ilalim ng Project Glasswing na may ~50 launch partners (AWS, Apple, Broadcom, Cisco, CrowdStrike, Google, JPMorgan, Linux Foundation, Microsoft, NVIDIA, Palo Alto Networks + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs); $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations** — Ang report kahapon ay completely natuluyan ang Mythos / Glasswing context. Ngayon ay re-frames ang May 1 Pentagon-Anthropic stand-off: ang freeze ay procurement-stack-level, ngunit ang same model na tinanggihan ng Pentagon na i-procure ay ang one na inaasahan ng NSA para sa sovereign cyber benchmarking. Structurally re-reads ang May 1 "frontier-lab × DoD line in the sand" framing bilang mas may nuance.

items.headline: **Pagwawasto: Pentagon May 1 vendor count ay 8, hindi 7 — ang Oracle ay idinagda
items.diff_narrative: **Pagwawasto: Pentagon May 1 vendor count ay 8, hindi 7 — ang Oracle ay idinagdag sa loob ng ilang oras pagkatapos ng original 7-vendor announcement (SpaceX, OpenAI, Google, NVIDIA, Reflection, Microsoft, AWS + Oracle); ang Anthropic ay nananatiling explicitly excluded; existing Anthropic deployments sa classified networks ay binigyan ng 6-month sunset window** — Ang report kahapon ay nakilala ang 7-vendor split. Ngayon ay nagwawasto sa count at nagdadagdag ng existing-Anthropic-deployment 6-month sunset framing.

items.headline: **Bago: Microsoft Agent 365 Registry Sync (May 1) — kasama ng GA, ang Microsoft
items.diff_narrative: **Bago: Microsoft Agent 365 Registry Sync (May 1) — kasama ng GA, ang Microsoft ay nag-shi-ship ng public preview ng cross-cloud Agent Registry Sync sa AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform; Defender per-agent relationship-map ay nagpapakita ng MCP servers + identities + cloud resources bilang single ops view; Anthropic Claude Code + GitHub Copilot CLI named bilang upcoming local-agent integrations pagkatapos ng open-source OpenClaw entry path; MCP SDK monthly downloads ~97M sa March 2026** — Ang report kahapon ay may Agent 365 GA ngunit natuluyan ang Registry Sync multicloud preview, na siyang structural-precedent-shift para sa MCP-Gateway thesis (single-vendor → cross-cloud protocol).

items.headline: **Bago: Anthropic creative connectors (Apr 28 carry sa May 2-3 weekend) — 9 Clau
items.diff_narrative: **Bago: Anthropic creative connectors (Apr 28 carry sa May 2-3 weekend) — 9 Claude connectors ay nag-plug sa Anthropic sa Adobe Creative Cloud, Blender, Ableton Live, Autodesk Fusion, Splice, SketchUp, Affinity by Canva, Resolume Arena, Resolume Wire; ang Anthropic ay naging Corporate Patron ng Blender Development Fund (kasama ng Netflix, Epic, Wacom)** — Ang report kahapon ay hindi nag-flag ng creative-connector wave. Ngayon ay nagdadagdag bilang Anthropic's white-space pivot habang Pentagon-locked-out: cyber (Mythos) + creative (connectors) ay nagiging operative go-to-market vectors during the procurement freeze.

items.headline: **Bago: Tesla Optimus Q2 2026 Fremont production prep — Sinimulan ng Tesla ang f
items.diff_narrative: **Bago: Tesla Optimus Q2 2026 Fremont production prep — Sinimulan ng Tesla ang first large-scale Optimus humanoid-robot factory build-out sa Fremont sa Q2, unti-unting tinatanggal ang legacy Model S + Model X production lines para magbigay ng espasyo para sa first-generation 1M-units/year nameplate robotics plant; Optimus 3 ay mag-la-launch "summer 2026" na may daan-daang units this year na nag-ra-ramp up patungong libu-libo tapos sampu-sampung libo by 2027-2028; price target $20K-$30K** — Ang report kahapon ay may Apptronik + Figure + Tesla Optimus Gen 3 carry ngunit hindi ang Fremont 1M-units/year nameplate facility plan. Ngayon ay nagdadagdag bilang first hyperscaler-style physical-AI capex commitment.

items.headline: **Bago: Iran-tension oil spike — WTI crude near $105 (+12% sa linggo) habang ang
items.diff_narrative: **Bago: Iran-tension oil spike — WTI crude near $105 (+12% sa linggo) habang ang May 1 State Department + Treasury joint Iran enforcement package + standing 25% Trump secondary-tariff threat ay nag-re-price ng Mideast risk sa energy bid; CBOE VIX 16.99 (+0.59%) ay nagsa-signal ng contained equity volatility patungong May 1 record-tape weekend** — Ang report kahapon ay may May 1 Iran enforcement package ngunit hindi nag-quantify ng WTI move. Ngayon ay nagdadagdag ng energy-bid leg bilang swing macro variable patungong May 5 AMD + May 8 Apr Jobs week.

items.headline: **Bago: Anthropic Mythos Preview model card (April 7 launch + AWS Bedrock gated
items.diff_narrative: **Bago: Anthropic Mythos Preview model card (April 7 launch + AWS Bedrock gated research preview) — limitado ng Anthropic ang Mythos sa Project Glasswing partners only; AWS Bedrock ay nag-shi-ship ng Mythos bilang Gated Research Preview SKU; red.anthropic.com/2026/mythos-preview/ ay na-post bilang technical disclosure page; Schneier April writeup ay nag-confirm ng cyber-capability framing; publicly nag-state ang Anthropic na "Mythos is currently far ahead of any other AI model in cyber capabilities"** — Ang report kahapon ay walang Mythos sa lahat. Ngayon ay nagdadala ng full disclosure stack bilang foundation para sa new gated-frontier-cyber-AI thesis.

items.headline: **Bago: AMD May 5 Q1 2026 print preview — consensus EPS $1.28 / rev $9.88B (+33%
items.diff_narrative: **Bago: AMD May 5 Q1 2026 print preview — consensus EPS $1.28 / rev $9.88B (+33% YoY); guidance $9.8B (+/- $300M); gross margin -2pp QoQ to 55% (vs Q4 2025's $360M one-time MI308 China inventory-reserve reversal); MI400 ramp pace + OpenAI 6GW first-deployment H2 2026 + MI450 capacity planning + customer diversification ang focal investor questions; DA Davidson Buy at $375 PT (raised from $220 after Intel Q1 print)** — Ang report kahapon ay may AMD May 5 print at DA Davidson Buy upgrade. Ngayon ay nagdadagdag ng gross-margin-compression detail + OpenAI 6GW H2 first-deployment timing + MI450 capacity question.

items.headline: **Bago: Apr Jobs Report scheduled May 8 8:30 AM ET (BLS confirmed) — first major
items.diff_narrative: **Bago: Apr Jobs Report scheduled May 8 8:30 AM ET (BLS confirmed) — first major macro print pagkatapos ng May 5 AMD; March baseline 178K + UE 4.3% (BLS Apr 3 release); structurally the first non-earnings macro tape patungong May 15 Fed Chair handoff window** — Ang report kahapon ay may Apr Jobs date correction (mula May 1 patungong May 8) ngunit hindi nagdala ng March baseline o ng structural framing patungong Chair handoff.

items.headline: **Bago: Google Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite — 2.5x faster response time, 45% faster out
items.diff_narrative: **Bago: Google Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite — 2.5x faster response time, 45% faster output generation vs prior Gemini, $0.25 per million input tokens; positioned for high-volume agentic workloads laban sa Anthropic Haiku 4.5 + OpenAI's small-model tier** — Ang report kahapon ay hindi nag-flag ng Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite tier. Ngayon ay nagdadagdag bilang Google-side per-token-margin signal mirroring Anthropic + DeepSeek + Qwen pricing-floor competition.

items.headline: **Bago: arxiv KV-cache + agent-eval wave Apr 28 - May 3 — SideQuest (model-drive
items.diff_narrative: **Bago: arxiv KV-cache + agent-eval wave Apr 28 - May 3 — SideQuest (model-driven KV cache management for long-horizon agentic reasoning, arxiv 2602.22603 carry); DepthKV (layer-dependent KV cache pruning for long-context inference, 2604.24647); SAGE (service agent graph-guided eval benchmark, 2604.09285); LiveClawBench (LLM agents on real-world assistant tasks, 2604.13072); GAIA-v2-LILT (multilingual agent benchmark beyond translation, 2604.24929); KVFundaBench (comprehensive KV cache compression benchmark across world knowledge / reasoning / code / safety / long-context)** — Ang report kahapon ay may WindowsWorld + BenchGuard + multi-agent-vuln-discovery + Agent Harness Survey + CodeComp / CacheFlow / TokenDance / TTKV / PolyKV wave. Ngayon ay nagdadagdag ng SideQuest-style reasoning-driven KV-cache compression + DepthKV layer-pruning + SAGE/LiveClawBench/GAIA-v2-LILT eval wave.

items.headline: **Bago: AI Tinkerers SF Generative UI Global Hackathon: Agentic Interfaces (May
items.diff_narrative: **Bago: AI Tinkerers SF Generative UI Global Hackathon: Agentic Interfaces (May 9) — engineers ay nag-bu-build ng agentic UIs from model output, supported by Google DeepMind + CopilotKit; engineers ay nag-bu-build ng interactive UIs from model output gamit ang cutting-edge protocols, defining the generative UI stack through tool-enabled interface execution** — Ang report kahapon ay may May 9 hackathon ngunit hindi naka-surface ang Google DeepMind + CopilotKit sponsorship o ang "agentic interfaces from model output" framing.

items.headline: **Bago: Microsoft Build 2026 detailed agenda (June 2-3 Fort Mason SF) — 8 distin
items.diff_narrative: **Bago: Microsoft Build 2026 detailed agenda (June 2-3 Fort Mason SF) — 8 distinct session formats na may hands-on-labs + peer-collaboration emphasis; in-person attendance pinaliit sa ~2,500 (down from 5,000+ sa prior years); Satya Nadella opening keynote sa AI strategy + Azure roadmap + dev tooling; GitHub + Microsoft Foundry leadership presenting; in-person tickets $1,099; keynotes livestreamed free** — Ang report kahapon ay may Microsoft Build June 2-3 anchor + session catalog mention. Ngayon ay nagdadagdag ng format-shift detail (smaller, hands-on, fewer keynote slots).

items.headline: **Bago: Simon Willison May 2 weblog "Sightings" — small JS app fetching iNatural
items.diff_narrative: **Bago: Simon Willison May 2 weblog "Sightings" — small JS app fetching iNaturalist data para sa personal homepage syndication, built on phone with Claude Code for web; backfills decade ng iNaturalist observations sa site search + date archive pages** — Ang report kahapon ay may Willison May 1 Codex CLI 0.128.0 changelog. Ngayon ay nagdadagdag ng May 2 Sightings entry bilang further "personal AI as headless tooling" data-point — same dormant-pool 'Headless Everything' adjacency.

items.headline: **Patuloy: SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) — still unpatched into May 3 (~14 day
items.diff_narrative: **Patuloy: SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) — still unpatched into May 3 (~14 days post-disclosure); CERT/CC mitigation guidance ay nag-re-recommend ng ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment substitution bilang workaround hanggang umupstream fix; LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (CVSS 9.3) carry; Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 (CVSS 8.6) carry; UTT HiPER 1200GW + IBM Langflow CVE-2026-6543 (May 1 wave) carry; cPanel & WHM CVE-2026-41940 KEV (May 21 federal deadline) carry; Linux Copy Fail CVE-2026-31431 KEV (May 15 federal deadline) carry** — Carry-forward; ang SGLang ay ngayon ang longest-running 2026 unpatched LLM-tooling CVE sa 14 days.

items.headline: **Patuloy: Mag-7 super-week + AAPL Q3 guide +14-17% + $100B buyback + $700B 2026
items.diff_narrative: **Patuloy: Mag-7 super-week + AAPL Q3 guide +14-17% + $100B buyback + $700B 2026 capex tape + Cerebras IPO mid-May + Anthropic Opus 4.7 sa Claude products + API + Bedrock + Vertex AI + Microsoft Foundry + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime Node.js + Codex CLI 0.128.0 + Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + OpenAI Agents SDK + Powell stays past May 15 + Warsh Senate Banking confirm + Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 named techniques + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA + NIST CAISI agentic-AI security RFI** — Carry-forward.

items.headline: **Patuloy: DeepSeek V4 Pro / V4 Flash + Qwen 3.6 + Kimi K2.6 + GLM-5.1 (MIT lice
items.diff_narrative: **Patuloy: DeepSeek V4 Pro / V4 Flash + Qwen 3.6 + Kimi K2.6 + GLM-5.1 (MIT license) + PrismML Bonsai-8B 1-bit + Foundry Local GA + Unsloth 2026.4.8 + TurboQuant + PolyKV + NVIDIA kvpress + SGLang TurboQuant #21419 + #23134 + llama.cpp #20969 + new arxiv wave (CodeComp / CacheFlow / TokenDance / TTKV)** — Carry-forward.
